갈라디아서 1:1.content: Paul, an apostle—not from men, nor through man, but through Jesus Christ, and God the Father, who raised him from the dead—

갈라디아서 1:2.content: and all the brothers who are with me, to the assemblies of Galatia:

갈라디아서 1:3.content: Grace to you and peace from God the Father and our Lord Jesus Christ,

갈라디아서 1:4.content: who gave himself for our sins, that he might deliver us out of this present evil age, according to the will of our God and Father—

갈라디아서 1:5.content: to whom be the glory forever and ever. Amen.

갈라디아서 1:6.content: I marvel that you are so quickly deserting him who called you in the grace of Christ to a different “good news”,

갈라디아서 1:7.content: but there isn’t another “good news.” Only there are some who trouble you and want to pervert the Good News of Christ.

갈라디아서 1:8.content: But even though we, or an angel from heaven, should preach to you any “good news” other than that which we preached to you, let him be cursed.

갈라디아서 1:9.content: As we have said before, so I now say again: if any man preaches to you any “good news” other than that which you received, let him be cursed.

갈라디아서 1:10.content: For am I now seeking the favor of men, or of God? Or am I striving to please men? For if I were still pleasing men, I wouldn’t be a servant of Christ.

갈라디아서 1:11.content: But I make known to you, brothers, concerning the Good News which was preached by me, that it is not according to man.

갈라디아서 1:12.content: For I didn’t receive it from man, nor was I taught it, but it came to me through revelation of Jesus Christ.

갈라디아서 1:13.content: For you have heard of my way of living in time past in the Jews’ religion, how that beyond measure I persecuted the assembly of God and ravaged it.

갈라디아서 1:14.content: I advanced in the Jews’ religion beyond many of my own age among my countrymen, being more exceedingly zealous for the traditions of my fathers.

갈라디아서 1:15.content: But when it was the good pleasure of God, who separated me from my mother’s womb and called me through his grace

갈라디아서 1:16.content: to reveal his Son in me, that I might preach him among the Gentiles, I didn’t immediately confer with flesh and blood,

갈라디아서 1:17.content: nor did I go up to Jerusalem to those who were apostles before me, but I went away into Arabia. Then I returned to Damascus.

갈라디아서 1:18.content: Then after three years I went up to Jerusalem to visit Peter, and stayed with him fifteen days.

갈라디아서 1:19.content: But of the other apostles I saw no one except James, the Lord’s brother.

갈라디아서 1:20.content: Now about the things which I write to you, behold, before God, I’m not lying.

갈라디아서 1:21.content: Then I came to the regions of Syria and Cilicia.

갈라디아서 1:22.content: I was still unknown by face to the assemblies of Judea which were in Christ,

갈라디아서 1:23.content: but they only heard: “He who once persecuted us now preaches the faith that he once tried to destroy.”

갈라디아서 1:24.content: So they glorified God in me.
